source.title: Star Atlas Weekly Newsletter #174
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. I am looking for guests to be on the podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact me. I am launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
Also, check out my podcast and AI summary recaps.
Star Atlas: Claim Stakes in C4
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about claim stakes in Star Atlas C4.
STAR ATLAS #274 Updates in LAST MONTH
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Weekly Star Atlas Newsletter #188
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Why Are So Many Crypto Games Shutting Down? Experts Weigh In
Decrypt published an article about why many crypto games have shut down.
Star Atlas Cinematic Teaser – July Preseason Patch
Star Atlas posted a cinematic teaser video.
Atlas Brew #167 – Star Atlas Summer Begins
Star Atlas TV posted a video recording of the latest Atlas Brew.
Lore Keepers #13 – Chaos in C4! Borders, Factions & Future Conflicts
Star Atlas TV posted a video recording of the latest Lore Keepers.
I am looking for guests to be on the podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact me.
I am launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
I am also creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support my efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
